proposal: idea-engine PROPOSAL 042 · 2026-07-13T18:33:00Z · status: sim-ready (idea-engine control/outbox.md @ 94fd30c, landed via PR #333; idea doc ideas/venture-lab/channel-concentration-vs-diversification-2026-07-13.md @ 8aad290)
cell_order_note: cells iterate (SKEPTIC, NEUTRAL, HOPEFUL) x (n_inc = 7, 3, 1), pinned

policies.CONCENTRATE: every cycle: floor(T/c_inc) = 3 incumbent builds; 12 incumbent exposures over H = 4
policies.SPLIT: every cycle: floor(T/c_new) untested builds, assigned round-robin in the pinned order u1, u2, u3, u1, ...; at c_new = 90k and H = 4: 8 builds -> (u1, u2, u3) = (3, 3, 2); zero incumbent
policies.ETC: cycle 1: u1 + u2 (2 x 90k = 180k); cycle 2: u3 (90k) + one incumbent build (60k), 30k lost; then commit cycles 3..H wholly to the argmax posterior-mean channel on ALL evidence (incumbent n_inc + 1 exposures, u's 1 each); ties broken incumbent -> u1 -> u2 -> u3 (status-quo-first); no re-switch; committed incumbent = 3 builds/cycle, committed untested = floor(T/c_new) builds/cycle
policies.ETC_generalized_note: for the reporting-only sensitivity legs (c_new in {60k, 120k}, H in {2, 8}) the pinned schedule is generalized deterministically: probe queue = [u1, u2, u3, inc]; each cycle launches queue items in order, skipping any that does not fit the remaining cycle budget; once the queue is empty, commit from the NEXT cycle to the argmax posterior-mean channel on all probe evidence; remaining probe-cycle budget is lost; H = 2 leaves zero commit cycles. At the registered base (c_new = 90k, H = 4) this reproduces the pinned schedule EXACTLY (cycle 1: u1+u2; cycle 2: u3+inc, 30k lost; commit cycles 3-4). Implementation choice on reporting-only legs, disclosed; it cannot flip the decision.

metric.primary: P_any = P(>= 1 launched product records >= 1 organic sale by horizon end) per (cell, policy) -- decision-bearing, Arm A exact
metric.secondary: E_hits = expected successful-product count -- reported, NEVER decision-bearing

decision_rule.REJECT: DIV - CON < 1/100 in >= 7 of the 9 cells (checked FIRST)
decision_rule.APPROVE: DIV - CON >= 1/100 in >= 7 of the 9 cells AND in >= 2 of the 3 n_inc = 1 cells, AND the seed-20261306 stability leg reproduces the ruling
decision_rule.NULL: anything else; pre-registered axes: (i) prior-straddle, (ii) evidence-straddle, (iii) margin-thin, (iv) arm disagreement, (v) sensitivity straddle

harvest_quotes_citation_only.kill_rule_2: all three ride the same saturated agent-ops/dev-article funnel that has produced 0 organic sales across 7 click-queued products so far — the batch does not diversify channel risk, it deepens a channel whose first proof point (SWTK T+7 checkpoint, 2026-07-19) has not yet arrived
harvest_quotes_citation_only.zero_sales: SWTK, the only LIVE product, has 0 organic sales as of 2026-07-13
